idea-plugin.name: TakaTime
idea-plugin.description:
TakaTime is an open-source, privacy-first time tracker and coding telemetry engine built for developers. Track your coding activity, project time, and language usage directly inside your IDE without sending your personal data to third-party servers.

Key Features:

  • 100% Privacy & BYOD: Bring your own database. All telemetry is securely routed to your personal MongoDB instance.
  • Integrated TUI Dashboard: View your developer productivity analytics and coding stats natively inside the IDE's built-in terminal.
  • Smart Heartbeat Detection: Accurately calculates true coding duration and automatically pauses when you are away from the keyboard.
  • Cross-Platform Parity: Seamlessly syncs your coding metrics across JetBrains IDEs, VS Code, and Neovim.
  • The Open-Source Alternative: A lightweight, Go-based alternative to WakaTime, designed for maximum performance and zero UI freezing.

Take back control of your developer analytics. Configure your database, install the plugin, and start measuring your coding productivity today.
